title: Evaluate tier-floor policy from the merge-base, not the PR head
acceptance: verify reads the ENTIRE policy object (rules, default_floor, exempt_paths) from the merge-base ref via loadPolicyAtRef(mergeBase); no working-tree policy read remains in the verify enforcement path
a PR that lowers/deletes a floor rule AND/OR self-exempts in its own .quorum/policy.json is still graded by the BASE policy on both axes (tier floor and coverage/exempt_paths)
tier reads base policy by default (merge-base resolved as in verify); head-policy inspection only via a labeled, non-default --policy=head diagnostic
fail closed: policy absent at base -> protocol error (no head fallback, no permissive default); malformed or schema-rejected base policy -> fatal protocol error
Gate prerequisites (authenticated base-policy read, mechanical branch-freshness, trusted/pinned verifier code) are tracked in QRM-4.0, not here - this PR secures policy DATA, not verifier CODE
quorum verify --local --task QRM-3.2 yields a clean verified ledger covering every changed path at T3
